seoTitle: Tamarama vs Tambar Springs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tamarama and Tambar Springs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tamarama vs Tambar Springs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tamarama and Tambar Springs.
heading: Tamarama vs Tambar Springs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tamarama, New South Wales and Tambar Springs, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tambar Springs has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Tamarama (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tamarama or Tambar Springs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tamarama has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Tambar Springs scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tamarama scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Tambar Springs scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tamarama or Tambar Springs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tambar Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
